name: Almond Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. For the pastry: Combine the flour, egg yolks, salt, sugar, and vanilla extract in a bowl. Gradually add butter until a soft dough forms. Do not overmix. Chill for 30 minutes.
2. Roll out and line an 11- or 12-inch pie or tart pan with the dough. Prick the base and chill for 15-20 minutes.
3. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
4. For the filling: Heat 1/3 of the butter in a saute pan, add chopped almonds, and cook until browned. Set aside.
5. Melt the remaining butter in a small saucepan. Cool.
6. In a bowl, mix ground almonds and sugar with eggs one at a time, beating after each addition until the mixture is light and thick.
7. Sift potato or cornstarch, baking powder, and salt into the almond mixture and fold in.
8. Fold in melted butter. Do not overmix.
9. Pour the filling into the prepared tart shell and bake for 10-12 minutes or until the batter begins to set.
10. Scatter chopped almonds evenly over the top. Return the tart to the oven and continue baking for 17-20 minutes or until the pastry is brown and the filling is firm.
